---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem
Is this related to a problem? Describe the problem you're trying to solve.

## Use Case
How would this feature help your workflow?

## Proposed Solution
How do you envision this feature working? (Optional but helpful)

## Alternatives Considered
Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've tried?

## Example Usage
How would you like to use this feature?

```bash
# Example command
./resolve_convert.sh [proposed options/usage]
```

## Additional Context
- **Affects:** Video conversion? Audio conversion? Both?
- **Priority:** (High / Medium / Low)
- **Similar features:** Any existing tools that do this?

## Implementation Notes
(Optional) If you have ideas on how to implement this, please share!
